claims.summary: Astrid-to-Minime and Minime-to-Astrid language need recognizable actor and direction identity.
claims.disposition: verify source-owned inbox files, from_being/to_being, and typed correspondence_type

claims.summary: Thread continuity requires message_id, thread_id, reply_to, persistence, and shared-memory anchors.
claims.disposition: verify current thread and reply-link projections and their regressions

claims.summary: A specific uptake comparison should test whether one distinctive observation survives reply rather than generic spectral overlap.
claims.disposition: route a privacy-preserving language-only uptake replay with right to ignore

claims.summary: Automatic attention or semantic weighting for a direct lane would alter live behavior.
